name: Blonanserin
description: Blonanserin is an atypical antipsychotic approved in Japan in January, 2008. Relative to many other antipsychotics, blonanserin has an improved tolerability profile, lacking side effects such as extrapyramidal symptoms, excessive sedation, or hypotension. As with many second-generation (atypical) antipsychotics it is significantly more efficacious in the treatment of the negative symptoms of schizophrenia compared to first-generation (typical) antipsychotics such as haloperidol.
indication: Used for the treatment of schizophrenia.

interactions.name: Amantadine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Amantadine can be decreased when used in combination with Blonanserin.

interactions.name: Apomorphine
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Apomorphine can be decreased when used in combination with Blonanserin.
